results.rendered_html: madhye ind. in the middle, in the midst, within, between, among, in the presence of (with gen. or ifc.; sometimes also ibc.; cf.  Pāṇ. ii, 1, 18  and comp. below),  Mn. ;  MBh.  &c. (with √kṛ [ind.p. -kṛtya or -kṛtvā,  Pāṇ. i, 4, 76 ], to place in the middle, make an intermediary of  Kull.  on  Mn. iv, 80 ; to count among,  Kād. )
